# DATA-MAP — the committed tape corpus, one read

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/gen_data_map.py — do not hand-edit stats; edit
     ANNOTATIONS in the script and regenerate. `--check` verifies freshness. -->

Every statistic below is computed from the committed tape at generation time.
Prose (purpose / status / consumers) is curated in `scripts/gen_data_map.py`.
Companion documents: `tape/README.md` (commit policy), `PROVENANCE.md` (trust
tags), `kb/strategies/00-index.md` (what the Sx/Qx consumers mean),
`scripts/tape_gap_monitor.py` (pipe-health monitor these stats feed).
Not covered here: `data/` (gitignored local bulk — see project CLAUDE.md) and
`paper/` (append-only paper-trading ledger).

## tape/anomalies/ — `active`

Daily platform-wide sweep for fee-clearing bracket/monotonicity violations (S3/Q6). NOTE 2026-07-22: audit found 99.97% of accumulated flags are ask=0 no-offer artifacts + cross-entity mis-nests — do NOT mine this family for candidates until the sweep's grouping is fixed.

*Feeds:* S3, Q6

- span: 2026-07-04 → 2026-07-22 · dt-files: 17 · lines: 221 · size: 10.8M (all 17 files)
- missing days in span: 2026-07-09, 2026-07-10
- price_source_tag (sample of newest file, ≤500 lines): <untagged>: 2
- schema_version: anomaly_sweep.v1
- fields (first sampled record): anomalies, capture_id, captured_at, completeness_ok, fetch_error, markets_truncated, n_anomalies, n_bracket_groups_checked, n_event_groups, n_implication_pairs_checked, n_markets_scanned, n_monotonicity_groups_checked, raw_sha256, schema_version, venue

## tape/perp_tape/ — `active`

Kalshi crypto PERP venue: contract list, BTC/ETH L2, live funding estimates, finalized funding prints. Carries the funding-clamp anomaly (Kalshi pins funding to 0 in ~91-100% of snapshots; offshore never does).

## tape/polymarket_cpi_pairs/ — `active`

CPI bucket pairing Kalshi<->Polymarket. WARNING: the Kalshi leg is a SYNTHETIC derived_prob and is degenerate for exact/ceiling buckets (|prob_gap|>1 rows exist) — never treat its gap as fillable.

*Feeds:* Q32-adjacent econ pairing

## tape/settlement_ledger/ — `active`

THE label set: daily platform-wide settled-market harvest (result/settlement_value, broker_truth, deduped, append-only). Kalshi purges settled markets ~60d after close (L11) — this family is what keeps y-variables from being lost. Froze silently 07-18..21 (L123); catch-up gating added 2026-07-22.

*Feeds:* every backtest's y-variable; Q45

- span: 2026-07-17 → 2026-07-23 · dt-files: 3 · lines: 15,615 · size: 11.6M (all 3 files)
- missing days in span: 2026-07-18, 2026-07-19, 2026-07-20, 2026-07-21

- schema_version: settlement_ledger.v1

## tape/sports_pairs/ — `active`
